1.label: Lifeline
1.description: Reports the device status and allows for assigning single device only (main controller by default).

2.label: On/Off (IN1)
2.description: Assigned to IN1 input terminal (uses Basic command class).

3.label: On/Off (IN2)
3.description: Assigned to IN2 input terminal (uses Basic command class).

paramInformation.label: Input 1 - Operating Mode
paramInformation.description: This parameter allows to choose mode of 1st input (IN1). Change it depending on connected device.

options.label: Analog input without internal pull-up (Multilevel sensor)
Analog input with internal pull-up (Multilevel sensor)

paramInformation.label: Input 1 (Activated): Value Sent to Group 2
paramInformation.description: Value sent to devices in 2nd association group when IN1 input is triggered. Relevant only if parameter 20 is set to 0 or 1 (alarm mode).

paramInformation.label: Input 1 (Deactivated): Value Sent to Group 2
paramInformation.description: Value sent to devices in 2nd association group when IN1 input is deactivated. Relevant only if parameter 20 is set to 0 or 1 (alarm mode).

paramInformation.label: Input 1: Send Scenes (Key Held Down & Released)
Input 2 - Operating Mode
paramInformation.description: This parameter allows to choose mode of 2nd input (IN2). Change it depending on connected device.

options.label: Analog input without internal pull-up (Multilevel sensor)
Analog input with internal pull-up (Multilevel sensor)

paramInformation.label: Input 2 (Activated): Value Sent to Group 3
paramInformation.description: Value sent to devices in 3rd association group when IN2 input is triggered. Relevant only if parameter 21 is set to 0 or 1 (alarm mode).

paramInformation.label: Input 2 (Deactivated): Value Sent to Group 3
paramInformation.description: Value sent to devices in 3rd association group when IN2 input is deactivated. Relevant only if parameter 21 is set to 0 or 1 (alarm mode).

paramInformation.label: Input 2: Send Scenes (Key Held Down & Released)
External Sensors: Reporting Threshold
paramInformation.description: Minimal change of external sensor values (DS18B20 or DHT22) that results in sending new report. 1 unit corresponds to 0.1 °C or 0.1% humidity.

options.label: Contacts normally open, closed when active
Contacts normally closed, open when active
Contacts normally open, closed when active
Contacts normally closed, open when active

metadata.inclusion:
1. Power the device.
2. Set the main controller in (Security/non-Security Mode) add mode (see the controller's manual).
3. Quickly, triple click button on the device housing or switch connected to IN1 or IN2.
4. If you are adding in Security S2 Authenticated, scan the DSK QR code or input the 5-digit PIN code (label on the bottom of the box).
5. LED will start blinking yellow, wait for the adding process to end.
metadata.exclusion:
1. Power the device.
2. Set the main controller into remove mode (see the controller's manual).
3. Quickly, triple click button on the device housing or switch connected to IN1 or IN2.
4. LED will start blinking yellow, wait for the removing process to end.
metadata.reset:
1. Press and hold the button to enter the menu.
2. Release button when the device glows yellow.
3. Quickly click the button to confirm.
4. After few seconds the device will be restarted, which is signalled with the red colour.
